overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character fishing along a river in a red rock canyon environment. The character walks along the sandy shore, casts a fishing line into the calm water, relocates to a new spot, and successfully hooks and reels in a fish.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy riverbank with red rock canyon backdrop

events.description: character stops walking and takes out fishing rod
character casts fishing line into the river

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy riverbank before stopping to prepare fishing equipment

entered.detail: layered red rock formations rising on the left side of the river
layered red rock formations rising on the right side of the river
calm reflective water surface of the river
sandy and pebbled shoreline where character stands
wooden fishing rod equipped by the character

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide sandy riverbank flanked by dramatic red rock canyon formations under a clear blue sky. The character stops, takes out a fishing rod, and casts the line into the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river fishing spot with panoramic canyon views

events.description: camera shifts from side view to behind-the-character perspective

agents.ego_description: standing still holding the fishing rod, occasionally reeling the line while facing the river

segments.scene_description: From a behind-the-character perspective, the cowboy stands stationary at the water's edge, holding the fishing line in the calm river. The camera frames the expansive red rock canyon formations directly ahead across the reflective water.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy riverbank with scattered desert vegetation

events.description: character begins walking along the shoreline to a new fishing position

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shore while holding the fishing rod, moving to a new fishing spot

entered.detail: sparse dry bushes and shrubs along the sandy bank

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sandy riverbank past sparse desert vegetation, relocating to a new fishing position further along the shore while the red rock canyon walls remain visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: river fishing spot where fish is hooked

events.description: fish bites the hook and splashes in the water
character reels in the fish, bending the rod under tension

agents.ego_description: actively reeling in a hooked fish, pulling the rod back to secure the catch

notable_agents.action: fish thrashing and splashing in the water as it is being reeled in

entered.detail: fish visible splashing at the surface of the water

segments.scene_description: At the new fishing spot, the character hooks a fish and actively reels it in. The fishing rod bends under tension as the fish splashes in the water, creating ripples and movement on the calm river surface against the backdrop of the red rock canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sandy riverbank that transitions from a quiet walk to the active struggle of catching a fish. It begins with the character walking beside a wide river flanked by dramatic red rock canyon formations under a clear blue sky before stopping to cast a fishing line into the calm water. As the camera settles into a stationary perspective from behind, the view opens up to frame the expansive canyon walls reflecting across the still surface. The scene then shifts as the character moves past sparse desert vegetation to relocate further along the shore, keeping the towering red rocks in the background. Finally, the camera focuses on the new fishing spot where the rod bends under tension and the calm water breaks into splashes and ripples as a fish is successfully reeled in.
